description: Set up the packages/federation package scaffold with package.json, tsconfig.json, and install dependencies. Verify the package integrates with the monorepo by running pnpm install and checking typecheck passes on an empty barrel export.
steps: Create packages/federation/package.json with name @quant/federation, type: module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts for typecheck (tsc --noEmit) and test (vitest run). Dependencies: zod ^3.24.2, pino ^9.6.0, @quant/common workspace:*, @quant/queue workspace:*. DevDependencies: @types/node ^22.0.0, vitest ^2, typescript ~5.5.0.
Create packages/federation/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir: dist, rootDir: src, composite: true. Include src/**/*. Exclude node_modules, dist.
Create packages/federation/src/index.ts as an empty barrel export file with a comment placeholder.
Run pnpm install from workspace root to link the new package.
Run npx tsc --noEmit in packages/federation to verify TypeScript is set up correctly.
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit passes in the federation package directory
verification: Run 'pnpm install' from workspace root and confirm exit code 0
Run 'npx tsc --noEmit' in packages/federation and confirm exit code 0
findings: NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared (NODE_OPTIONS="") for pnpm install, npx, and git commit to work in this environment. The commit-msg hook runs pnpm commitlint which also requires NODE_OPTIONS="".
